questions.question: For how long is Satan bound in the abyss?
questions.feedback: Satan is bound for a thousand years and locked in the abyss.

questions.question: What happens at the great white throne judgment?
options: The dead are judged according to what they had done
questions.correct: The dead are judged according to what they had done
questions.feedback: The dead were judged according to what they had done as recorded in the books.

questions.question: Death and Hades are thrown into the lake of fire.
questions.feedback: Death and Hades were thrown into the lake of fire — the second death.

questions.question: Anyone whose name was not found in the book of _____ was thrown into the lake of fire.
questions.feedback: Anyone not found in the book of life was thrown into the lake of fire.

questions.question: The second death has no power over those who share in the first _____.
questions.feedback: The second death has no power over those in the first resurrection.
